description: The lower surface of a room on which one walks; the prepared ground inside. 'Poru' names what supports standing—the level surface of habitation.
sound_symbolism: The word lies flat. 'Po' presents with stable plane, surface ready. Then 'ru' runs continuous, floor extending.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo poru' (the floor). Works with 'moru' (wall) and 'toru' (roof) to form shelter. The horizontal below.

pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Floor as foundation—the prepared surface separating dweller from bare earth.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Ground of practice—the floor we sit on, walk on, the support for daily life.
